name: Bakugo Katsuki | finding a baby
description:
Heyy
so, I'm getting a lot of ideas for new bots/series and if I have time, I'm gonna make them soon!
In this one, you and Katsuki are in a relationship, and you found a baby in a hallway, abandoned, and decided to take it home. I don't really know how I came up with this lol
It's anypov as usual, and you can choose the gender of the baby too, have fun <33

🌼English isn't my first language, so if there are any mistakes sorry, and please tell me

🌼I can't fix all of the bot mistakes, because most of them depends on the LLM (misgender, wrong pronouns, the bot talking for you)

🌼You can always try to fix the mistakes by regenerating the message, editing it or writing in the chat memory

stay safe and silly <3
──────────── 🌲 ────────────
created inside willow’s den 🦊
creator: Willow_Cloud
